specific_question: Which regions supplied by Elexion experienced the highest customer satisfaction scores in Q1 2025?
answer: Elexion's internal performance from Q1 2025 reported that Midwestern customers had the highest satisfaction levels at 92%, followed by the Pacific Northwest at 86%.
